w20: Dedicated CPU instance with 48 vCPUs and 192GB RAM, offering strong multi-core performance and fast local SSD storage for demanding workloads.
c150: Hetzner Cloud ccx63: Dedicated x86_64 AMD EPYC Milan CPU with 48 vCPUs, 192GB RAM, and 960GB SSD. Strong multi-core and LLM inference performance.
c200: Hetzner Cloud ccx63 provides a dedicated x86_64 AMD EPYC Milan CPU (48 vCPUs, 192GB RAM) and 960GB local SSD. It delivers strong multi-core CPU performance and top-tier LLM inference speeds for demanding applications.
w150: Hetzner Cloud ccx63 is a dedicated CPU instance featuring an x86_64 AMD EPYC Milan processor with 48 virtual CPUs across 24 physical cores, operating at 2.0 GHz. This configuration includes 192 GB of memory and 960 GB of local SSD storage. The CPU supports AVX, AES, SHA-NI, BMI2, ADX, and FMA instructions. Performance benchmarks indicate top-tier single-core CPU performance at 3058.9 stress-ng units and strong multi-core CPU performance at 73650.13 stress-ng units. It also demonstrates strong performance in compiling software with clang (46060.0), ray tracing (59291.0), and various Passmark CPU tests. LLM inference for small models shows top-tier text generation at 334.39 tokens/sec. Memory bandwidth is categorized as average. This server is suitable for compute-intensive workloads such as CI/CD, data processing, and small-scale LLM inference.
